title: microcos philippinensis
intro: Microcos philippinensis, also known as the Philippine stiltroot or Philippine stiltroot tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Microcos philippinensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also dried and used as a powder or capsule for its medicinal properties.
